{{CargoClone
|name=Crimson Dragon
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=190
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=For Round 1, All ELMT DMG +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Dragon Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
